body.title: Smoke tests: web_server health endpoint + skill installer
body.result: smoke tests validated: 15/15 passing — /api/health returns 200+status:ok, agentctl skills status exits 0; pre-existing cc1_minion module error unrelated
body.description:
Pre-Monday validation: verify the two human-facing surfaces work. Web server: GET /api/health returns 200 with a valid JSON health vector. Skill installer: agentctl skills status runs without error and lists at least one deployed skill.

**Affected files:** tests/web_server/ (create if missing), devices/web_server/, devices/installer/
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; web_server test may use requests or httpx against a running local instance
**Scope boundary:** IN — health endpoint returns 200 JSON; agentctl skills status exits 0; OUT — full dashboard render, per-skill deploy/undeploy
**Completion criteria:** curl localhost:<port>/api/health returns 200 JSON with 'status' key; agentctl skills status exits 0 listing deployed skills
